prompt: What's this strategy pattern thing I see in the order service? There's SingleLocationStrategy and MostAbundantStrategy - what's the difference and how do I switch between them?

assertions.text: Explains SingleLocationStrategy ships all items from one warehouse
Explains MostAbundantStrategy ships from location with highest stock per product
Explains how to configure via application.yml
Shows the configuration property path: app.order.strategy
Lists the valid values: SINGLE_LOCATION and MOST_ABUNDANT
Explains the tradeoffs between strategies (simplicity vs optimization)
